target_0.brief_supporting_logic: The building in the green outline shows no visible structural damage, missing windows, or collapsed elements; facade appears intact and undisturbed compared to the heavily damaged building in the foreground.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible evidence shows extensive structural failure with collapsed floors, exposed internal framing, and missing exterior walls across multiple upper levels; the lower section also exhibits severe collapse and debris; this constitutes 75 to 100 percent damage to the target building as a whole.

summary: Two buildings are assessed: one with NO DAMAGE and another DESTROYED. The scene shows a heavily damaged multi-story building with collapsed floors, exposed interiors, and missing walls, alongside an intact building in the background. The functional impact is likely severe for the destroyed building, rendering it uninhabitable and structurally unsafe.
